title: Installer pairing final summary and exit regressions
acceptanceCriteria: Live installer finalization no longer shows contradictory manual pairing fallback when a host can already be truthfully classified as reused or auto-refreshed.
Existing paired or active hosts render a reuse-only summary with no manual `pnpm daemon:pair` step.
Existing unpaired/registering hosts render auto-refresh guidance with a concrete `/pair CODE` handoff when prerequisites are ready.
Probe/request failures remain honest and actionable, with blocked/manual fallback only when automation truly cannot proceed safely.
Final summary closes on Enter and the installer process can return the shell prompt.
Deterministic regression coverage exists for reuse, refresh, manual fallback, final-screen close, and no unresolved wait path after the final summary.
